paths../telemetry: Use @/telemetry instead of a relative import — relative paths cause the bundler to emit duplicate module copies, breaking the singleton.
paths.@earendil-works/pi-ai/compat: pi-ai's /compat entrypoint is its deprecated pre-Models-runtime surface (LET-10131). Use the root entrypoint, @earendil-works/pi-ai/providers/*, or the LocalPiModelsRuntime seam. Sole allowed exception: getEnvApiKey in pi-provider-registry.ts (no non-compat entrypoint upstream yet).

paths../telemetry: Use @/telemetry instead of a relative import — relative paths cause the bundler to emit duplicate module copies, breaking the singleton.
